name: 王伯雅
objective:
本課程探討人工智慧（AI）如何整合並提升語言學習與教學。學生將學習第二語言習得理論，如互動理論與社會文化理論，並連結這些理論與 AI 輔助語言學習工具。透過實作與專題討論，學生將實際操作 AI 工具，並從學習者與教師的角度設計有效且具倫理意識的 AI 語言學習任務。課程旨在培養學生的 AI 素養，使其能夠批判性地評估與應用 AI 技術，以因應課堂內外多元的語言學習與教學需求。
This course explores how artificial intelligence (AI) can be integrated and enhance language learning and teaching. Students will examine key SLA theories—such as interactionist and sociocultural approaches—and connect them to AI-supported learning tools. Through hands-on practice and discussion, students will explore AI tools and have opportunities to design effective, ethical AI-integrated language tasks from both learner and teacher perspectives. The course aims to build students’ AI literacy, enabling them to critically evaluate and apply AI technologies to support diverse language learning needs in both classroom and self-directed contexts.

scorePolicy:
Attendance	15%
Quizzes+In-class activities	15%
Weekly assignment	15%
Final group presentation	30%
Final group presentation report	25%
課程是否導入AI: ● 使用生成式 AI 作為教學過程的輔助工具（Use generative AI tools as an aid to the teaching process）● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）● 使用生成式 AI 進行課堂即時互動（Use generative AI for real-time classroom interaction）● 簡單介紹 AI 的基本概念（Briefly introduce the basic concept of AI）● 深入探討 AI 的原理與應用（Explore the principles and applications of AI in depth）
